shortDescription: Sacred basil known for immunity and respiratory support.
description: Tulsi is widely revered in traditional medicine for adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. It is commonly consumed as tea or leaf extract for respiratory wellness.

shortDescription: A medicinal tree valued for antibacterial and skin benefits.
description: Neem leaves, bark, and seed oil have long been used in natural remedies. Its antimicrobial qualities make it popular for oral care, skin support, and traditional detox practices.

shortDescription: Succulent herb known for soothing skin and digestion support.
description: Aloe vera gel is widely used for cooling and moisturizing skin, especially for mild irritation. The inner pulp is also used in wellness traditions for digestive comfort.

shortDescription: Adaptogenic herb used for energy, stress, and vitality.
description: Ashwagandha root is a cornerstone herb in Ayurvedic practice. It is commonly associated with resilience, stress management, and support for mental and physical stamina.

shortDescription: Golden rhizome celebrated for anti-inflammatory compounds.
description: Turmeric contains curcumin, a bioactive compound studied for anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is widely used in food and wellness formulations.

shortDescription: Warming root used for digestion and seasonal wellness.
description: Ginger rhizome is traditionally used to ease nausea, support digestion, and provide warming relief in cold seasons. It is consumed fresh, dried, or as tea.

shortDescription: Creeping herb valued for memory and cognitive wellness.
description: Brahmi is widely used in Ayurveda as a nootropic herb. It is associated with mental clarity, concentration, and support for nervous system balance.

shortDescription: Nutrient-rich Indian gooseberry used for rejuvenation.
description: Amla fruit is rich in vitamin C and antioxidants. It is commonly used in herbal formulations for immunity, hair health, and digestive care.

shortDescription: Aromatic herb used for tea, digestion, and relaxation.
description: Lemongrass is prized for its citrus aroma and soothing herbal infusions. It is traditionally used for digestion, mild detox support, and calming wellness routines.

shortDescription: Nutrient-dense tree known as the miracle tree.
description: Moringa leaves and pods are consumed for nutrient density and antioxidant value. Traditional practices use it for energy support and balanced nutrition.
